description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a white exterior and dark gray gable and flat roof sections. The front features a prominent entryway with a glass door, flanked by large windows and two garage doors on either side. The backyard includes a spacious swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a fenced yard with mature trees, a swing set, and a small playhouse. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a rooftop deck. Windows are generously sized and arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs.
description: A modern two-story white house with dark gray roofs, large windows, a front entryway, garages, a backyard pool, and landscaped yard with trees and play areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two garages, large windows, and the tree-lined front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the backyard pool area with patio seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, fenced yard, swing set, playhouse, and multiple balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the side elevation with more windows and roof terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass door with side windows, no porch, flanked by garages, minimal overhang, and clean modern lines
